news.title:
NMDC signed an MoU with GMDC on Mar 16, 2026 to focus on REE.
The collaboration aims to secure India's critical mineral supply chain.
news.summary:
NMDC signed an MoU with GMDC on Mar 16, 2026 to focus on REE.
The collaboration aims to secure India's critical mineral supply chain.

news.title:
Tata Motors to raise commercial vehicle prices by 1.5% from April 1, 2026; Sun Pharma's sBLA for ILUMYA accepted by US FDA.
RVNL wins ₹95.3 crore contract in Chhattisgarh; GMDC signs MoU with NMDC for rare earth collaboration in Gujarat.
news.summary:
Tata Motors to raise commercial vehicle prices by 1.5% from April 1, 2026; Sun Pharma's sBLA for ILUMYA accepted by US FDA.
RVNL wins ₹95.3 crore contract in Chhattisgarh; GMDC signs MoU with NMDC for rare earth collaboration in Gujarat.

news.title:
RVNL secures ₹95.3 crore contract from NMDC for track refurbishment in Chhattisgarh.
Q3 revenue up 2.6% YoY; EBITDA down 8%, margin at 4.7%. Interim dividend ₹1/share approved.
news.summary:
RVNL secures ₹95.3 crore contract from NMDC for track refurbishment in Chhattisgarh.
Q3 revenue up 2.6% YoY; EBITDA down 8%, margin at 4.7%. Interim dividend ₹1/share approved.

news.title:
GMDC shares in focus after MoU with NMDC to explore rare earth opportunities, including mining, processing, and downstream applications.
GMDC stock rose 116% YoY but fell 6% in a month; 2026 YTD decline is 11%, with a 52-week high of ₹651 and low of ₹245.
news.summary:
GMDC shares in focus after MoU with NMDC to explore rare earth opportunities, including mining, processing, and downstream applications.
GMDC stock rose 116% YoY but fell 6% in a month; 2026 YTD decline is 11%, with a 52-week high of ₹651 and low of ₹245.

news.title:
NMDC Ltd achieves milestone by producing 50M tonnes of iron ore in FY 2025-26.
It is the first Indian mining company to reach this production in a single financial year.
news.summary:
NMDC Ltd achieves milestone by producing 50M tonnes of iron ore in FY 2025-26.
It is the first Indian mining company to reach this production in a single financial year.

news.title:
NMDC Ltd received approval from Ministry of Steel and DIPAM to establish a wholly-owned subsidiary in GIFT City, Gujarat.
This follows NMDC's prior announcement dated 12th August 2025 and requires further necessary actions.
news.summary:
NMDC Ltd received approval from Ministry of Steel and DIPAM to establish a wholly-owned subsidiary in GIFT City, Gujarat.
This follows NMDC's prior announcement dated 12th August 2025 and requires further necessary actions.

news.title:
NMDC raises Baila Lump price by ₹100/tonne, now ₹4,800.
Baila Fines price increased by ₹50/tonne, now ₹4,050.
news.summary:
NMDC raises Baila Lump price by ₹100/tonne, now ₹4,800.
Baila Fines price increased by ₹50/tonne, now ₹4,050.

news.title:
NMDC Limited sets iron ore prices effective March 6, 2026.
Baila Lump priced at ₹4,800/ton; Baila Fines at ₹4,050/ton.
news.summary:
NMDC Limited sets iron ore prices effective March 6, 2026.
Baila Lump priced at ₹4,800/ton; Baila Fines at ₹4,050/ton.

news.title:
Metal stocks, including Tata Steel, SAIL, NMDC, plunged 5-8% as Nifty Metal dropped 5%, driven by geopolitical tensions and strong US dollar.
Analysts expect near-term pressure for the sector, with 11,650 as support and 12,100 as resistance; cautious approach advised.
news.summary:
Metal stocks, including Tata Steel, SAIL, NMDC, plunged 5-8% as Nifty Metal dropped 5%, driven by geopolitical tensions and strong US dollar.
Analysts expect near-term pressure for the sector, with 11,650 as support and 12,100 as resistance; cautious approach advised.

news.title:
NMDC's iron ore production and sales rose in Feb 2026 vs Feb 2025.
YTD production and sales saw notable growth, led by Chhattisgarh, Karnataka.
news.summary:
NMDC's iron ore production and sales rose in Feb 2026 vs Feb 2025.
YTD production and sales saw notable growth, led by Chhattisgarh, Karnataka.

news.title:
NMDC's Feb production reached 5.35 MT, sales at 4.60 MT.
Sales slightly down from 4.62 MT last month but higher than 3.98 MT YoY.
news.summary:
NMDC's Feb production reached 5.35 MT, sales at 4.60 MT.
Sales slightly down from 4.62 MT last month but higher than 3.98 MT YoY.

news.title:
RVNL secured ₹1,978 crore NMDC orders and ₹270.2 crore Central Railway contract.
Q3 FY26 net profit rose 4% YoY to ₹324 crore; order book exceeds ₹60,000 crore.
news.summary:
RVNL secured ₹1,978 crore NMDC orders and ₹270.2 crore Central Railway contract.
Q3 FY26 net profit rose 4% YoY to ₹324 crore; order book exceeds ₹60,000 crore.

news.title:
RVNL secures Rs 656.2 crore projects from NMDC in Chhattisgarh.
First contract involves building a residential tower worth Rs 284.5 crore.
news.summary:
RVNL secures Rs 656.2 crore projects from NMDC in Chhattisgarh.
First contract involves building a residential tower worth Rs 284.5 crore.

news.title:
Biocon Biologics, BahiaFarma, and Bionovis signed an MoU for developing Pertuzumab for HER2 breast cancer.
NMDC, Vale SA, and Adani Gangavaram Port inked a $500M MoU to blend and sell iron ore at Gangavaram SEZ.
news.summary:
Biocon Biologics, BahiaFarma, and Bionovis signed an MoU for developing Pertuzumab for HER2 breast cancer.
NMDC, Vale SA, and Adani Gangavaram Port inked a $500M MoU to blend and sell iron ore at Gangavaram SEZ.

news.title:
India seeks new steel export markets in the Middle East and Asia to offset the EU's carbon tax impact.
SAIL and NMDC explore coking coal assets in Australia, Brazil, and Argentina to secure raw materials.
news.summary:
India seeks new steel export markets in the Middle East and Asia to offset the EU's carbon tax impact.
SAIL and NMDC explore coking coal assets in Australia, Brazil, and Argentina to secure raw materials.

news.title:
NMDC increased lumps and fines prices by ₹100 each; lumps now ₹4,700/tonne, fines ₹4,000/tonne, effective Feb 10.
NMDC Q3 revenue rose 16% to ₹7,610.8 crore, but EBITDA fell 9.6%; shares declined 0.5% to ₹84.04 despite 31% YTD gain.
news.summary:
NMDC increased lumps and fines prices by ₹100 each; lumps now ₹4,700/tonne, fines ₹4,000/tonne, effective Feb 10.
NMDC Q3 revenue rose 16% to ₹7,610.8 crore, but EBITDA fell 9.6%; shares declined 0.5% to ₹84.04 despite 31% YTD gain.

news.title:
NMDC Ltd resets iron ore prices from 10 Feb 2026; Baila Lump at ₹4,700/ton.
Baila Fines priced at ₹4,000/ton, excluding taxes, GST, and environmental cess.
news.summary:
NMDC Ltd resets iron ore prices from 10 Feb 2026; Baila Lump at ₹4,700/ton.
Baila Fines priced at ₹4,000/ton, excluding taxes, GST, and environmental cess.

news.title:
NMDC Ltd declared a dividend of 250, i.e., 1/share, with an ex-date of Feb 13, 2026.
The company reported a strong total return of 38.9% over the past year.
news.summary:
NMDC Ltd declared a dividend of 250, i.e., 1/share, with an ex-date of Feb 13, 2026.
The company reported a strong total return of 38.9% over the past year.

news.title:
NMDC achieved record highs in production, sales, and financials in 9M FY26, with 42.65 MT production (+19%) and Rs 20,381 crore revenue (+22%).
The company inaugurated its first coal mine, declared Rs 2.50/share dividend, and reinforced its leadership in India's mining sector.
news.summary:
NMDC achieved record highs in production, sales, and financials in 9M FY26, with 42.65 MT production (+19%) and Rs 20,381 crore revenue (+22%).
The company inaugurated its first coal mine, declared Rs 2.50/share dividend, and reinforced its leadership in India's mining sector.

news.title:
NMDC and PSUs to discuss acquiring mineral assets in Indonesia, Malaysia.
Talks aim at expanding mineral resources, as reported by NDTV Profit.
news.summary:
NMDC and PSUs to discuss acquiring mineral assets in Indonesia, Malaysia.
Talks aim at expanding mineral resources, as reported by NDTV Profit.
